name: Brain MRI Post-Contrast
description: Brain MRI with gadolinium contrast for lesion enhancement evaluation

findings.technique: T1-weighted images were obtained following intravenous gadolinium administration.
findings.comparison: No prior MRI studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Parenchymal Enhancement
sections.content: No abnormal parenchymal enhancement identified. No mass or lesion demonstrating contrast uptake.

sections.name: Meningeal Enhancement
sections.content: No abnormal meningeal enhancement. Dura appears normal.

sections.name: Vascular Enhancement
sections.content: No abnormal vascular enhancement. Cranial nerves show normal course and enhancement.

sections.name: Ventricular Enhancement
sections.content: No ependymal or periventricular enhancement. Ventricular system is normal.

impression:
1. Normal post-contrast study.
2. No abnormal enhancement to suggest neoplasm, inflammation, or infection.
author: RadReport Templates
